chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2282 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah For hearing of bail application 03.11.2025 Mr. Khalid Hussain Shar, advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-. OMAR SIAL, J.- Syed Sardar Ali seeks post-arrest bail in crime number 335 of 2025 registered under section 96(b) of the Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 1997 at the Bin Qasim police station on 16.08.2025. The F.I.R. was registered as allegedly an aggregate of 150 grams of heroin in three packets was recovered from his possession. 2. The record reflects that some days before this incident, the family of the applicant filed a habeas corpus petition claiming that the CIA had picked up the applicant. A raid was organized. The learned magistrate conducting the raid on 15.08.2025 at the C.I.A. police station, and although the applicant was not found, his car was found parked at the station. The prosecution has been unable to satisfactorily explain the applicant's car's presence at the CIA police station on the day before the lodging of the F.I.R. in this case. The doubt that the case was registered after the learned magistrate had conducted the raid and found the car cannot be eliminated at this preliminary stage. The case against the applicant is one of further inquiry. 3. Given the above, the applicant is admitted to bail against a surety of Rs. 100,000 and a P.R. Bond for the same amount, subject to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. JUDGE JUDGE 2
